response.overview: Tucker Carlson reveals how companies use beloved right-wing voices to sell precious metals at astronomical markups, leaving hardworking Americans betrayed by the very people they trust. The scam has run for decades because those who should expose it are often paid to promote it. That ends now.
response.tagline: The gold scam has run for decades because those who should expose it are often paid to promote it. That ends now.
response.title: The Great Gold Scam
